mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT r.role_code FROM sys_user_role ur INNER JOIN sys_role r ON r.id = ur.role_id AND r.deleted = 0 WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.status = 1

SELECT DISTINCT m.perms FROM sys_user_role ur INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON rm.role_id = ur.role_id INNER JOIN sys_menu m ON m.id = rm.menu_id AND m.deleted = 0 WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.perms IS NOT NULL AND m.perms != ''
SELECT role_id FROM sys_user_role WHERE user_id = #{userId}
